title: justicia fragilis
intro: Justicia fragilis, also known as the fragile justicia or slender justicia, is a plant species in the Acanthaceae family. It is a shrub native to tropical Africa and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries. The medicinal properties of Justicia fragilis include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Justicia fragilis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures.
